mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, NAME AS userName, birth, email, address, phone FROM user WHERE user_id=#{id} AND PASSWORD=#{password}

SELECT v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%H시 %i분') AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, l.start_date as startDate, l.end_date as endDate FROM vehicle v INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = va.driver_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = va.lecture_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H시 %i분') AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, t1.name AS studentName FROM vehicle v INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = va.driver_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = va.lecture_id INNER JOIN (SELECT vp.assignment_id, u.name, vp.checked_at FROM vehicle_passenger vp INNER JOIN payment p ON vp.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id) t1 ON va.assignment_id = t1.assignment_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(t1.checked_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY l.end_time;
